data.title: Resouro lodges Mining Concession Application for Novo Mundo Gold Project and Project Update
data.description: For media inquiries or further information, reach out to Christopher Eager, the Chief Executive Officer at chris.eager@resouro.com. The recent report indicates a surge in revenue by 25% in Q3 of this fiscal year, reaching a record-breaking $500 million in sales. The company's stocks also rose by 15% following this positive financial performance. Eager credited this success to the launch of a new product line that attracted a significant number of new customers, resulting in a 30% increase in customer base. The company plans to expand operations globally and invest $50 million in research and development over the next quarter.

data.title: Lula's chances in Brazil election rise to 60.5% as Senate plans vote on Russia sanctions soon.
data.description: Next week, the Senate is set to vote on sanctions against Russia, according to a recent report. This move will bring the issue to the forefront of the political agenda in the coming days.

data.title: U.S. Government Affirms Manitowoc’s Anti-Dumping Claim
data.description: In Milwaukee, The Manitowoc Company, Inc. (NYSE: MTW), a major provider of engineered lifting solutions, has received a favorable decision from the U.S. International Trade Commission and U.S. Department of Commerce. They unanimously ruled against predatory dumping by Japanese producers of lattice-boom crawler cranes. The President and CEO, Aaron H. Ravenscroft, expressed satisfaction with the decision.

JUST IN: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest bought $51.2M of Tesla, $TSLA, on Thursday, its biggest trade of the day, per ARK's daily file. Bought: $51.2M Tesla, $TSLA $8.1M Circle, $CRCL $0.35M Securitize Sold: $19.5M Figma, $FIG $4.1M Robinhood, $HOOD

data.title: MaxsMaking Inc. Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Delisting Determination Notice
data.description: On July 23, 2026, a company known as MaxsMaking Inc. (Nasdaq: MAMK), specializing in personalized consumer products with an emphasis on cutting-edge technology and creativity, revealed that it has been issued a Staff Delisting Determination.

data.title: Laminar Pharma Announces "Last Patient, Last Visit" in LAM561 Phase 2b/3 Trial for Newly Diagnosed Glioblastoma Patients
data.description: In Palma de Mallorca, Spain, on July 23, 2026, a pioneering pharmaceutical company named Laminar Pharma revealed a significant development. The company specializes in creating advanced treatments using a unique membrane lipid therapy strategy. Today, it was declared that the final patient has finished their final visit in the Phase 2b/3 clinical trial conducted by the company. This signifies a crucial milestone in the trial, advancing towards conclusion and analysis of the data obtained. This achievement marks a crucial step forward in the research and development efforts of Laminar Pharma, signifying progress in their mission to introduce innovative therapies.

data.title: NIIT Learning Systems Limited Announces Q1 FY'27 (April - June 2026) Results
data.description: During the first quarter of the fiscal year 2027, NIIT Learning showcased impressive growth in revenue with a total of Rs. 565.1 Cr, marking a significant 25% increase compared to the same period last year. The EBITDA also saw a positive growth, reaching Rs. 103.2 Cr which is a 9% increase year-on-year, leading to an EBITDA margin of 18.3%. The Profit After Tax (PAT) stood at Rs. 57.4 Cr, showing a 16% growth from the previous year. The Earnings Per Share (EPS) for this quarter was reported at Rs. 4.17. Additionally, the company welcomed 3 new Long Term Annuity logos, bringing the total count to 113. The Revenue Visibility for NIIT Learning now stands at an impressive USD 462 million.

data.title: Arnold & Itkin Secures $604 Million Verdict Over Deadly 18-Wheeler Crash
data.description: A Dallas County jury has found freight broker C.H. Robinson responsible for contracting a trucking company flagged for federal safety alerts. This marks the initial verdict against the company following the U.S. Supreme Court's recent approval of such lawsuits. The ruling was made on July 23, 2026, in Dallas.

data.title: HBSS Alerts Roblox Corporation (RBLX) Investors to Expanded Class Period; Lead Plaintiff Deadline Remains August 7, 2026
data.description: On July 23, 2026, a national shareholder rights firm, Hagens Berman, released information notifying investors in Roblox Corporation (NYSE: RBLX) that the speculated timeframe for the ongoing securities class action lawsuit has been broadened. data.title: Pro-Active Fraud Researcher and Uncoverer Barry Minkow Launches Fraud News Network -- Real-Time News
data.description: A cutting-edge AI tool, powered by Genspark, enables users to input private investment offerings and promptly obtain a risk score ranging from 1 to 10 at no cost. This service allows individuals to assess potential risks prior to making any financial commitments. FNN now exclusively releases all fresh updates from Minkow investigations. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on July 23, 2026 via PRNewswire by Pro-Active Fraud Researcher.
